last_comment: Similar to Fool's Mate.  I would like to thank Mr. Sielecki for the permission to use this line.
Smothered Mate in the opening.  I would like to thank Mr. Sielecki for the permission to use this line.
Lolli's Mate.  Tryfon Gavriel (Kingscrusher) used this beautiful sequence to checkmate his online opponent.  I would like to thank Mr. Gavriel for the permission to use this game.
Similar to Scholar's Mate / Damiano's Bishop Mate.

Legal's Mate. This variation and similar ones are discussed in my course 'Common Opening Traps and Blunders 1. e4 : Part 2', @@LinkStart@@https://www.chessable.com/common-opening-traps-and-blunders1e4-part-2/course/85453/@@LinkEnd@@.
Smothered Mate. A brilliant picture: Black's King is surrounded by 4 of his own pieces and a pawn, but none of them can prevent a single White Knight from checkmating the King!

Suffocation Mate.  This checkmate pattern is a common opening trap in several openings, including the Modern Defense, as descibed in part 2 of my chessable series 'Common Opening Traps and Blunders: 1.e4', @@LinkStart@@https://www.chessable.com/common-opening-traps-and-blunders1e4-part-2/course/8545
Smothered Mate in the opening. This is undoubtedly one of the most common checkmates in history!
Opera Mate / Mayet's Mate.  I would like to thank Mr. Sielecki for the permission to use this line.
Damiano's Bishop Mate. Note that the Rook on f7 is pinned to the King.
And checkmating the King with the second Knight @@StartBracket@@Double Knights Mate@@EndBracket@@!
Similar to Double Bishops Mate. Note that before the trade of Rooks, the Queen was still on c4 , making @@SANStart@@Bb6@@SANEnd@@+ impossible!
Boden's Mate.  I would like to thank Mr. Sielecki for the permission to use this line.
Back Rank Mate. Black's Queen is pinned to the King by the Bishop!
David & Goliath Mate / Pawn Mate. This was the point of the Knight check on e5 , to recapture with a pawn on e5 while checkmating Black's King!

David & Goliath Mate / Pawn Mate.  This game was repeated in Beth Harmon-Schaibel, as seen in the 'The Queen's Gambit' television series. Mr. Schaibel resigned after 13.Qe8+. @@LinkStart@@https://www.chess.com/article/view/queens-gambit-every-chess-position#episode-1@@LinkEnd@@
Max Lange's Maneuver into Damiano's Bishop Mate.
Max Lange's Maneuver into Damiano's Bishop Mate.
Swallow's Tail Mate / Guéridon Mate. What a finish!!
Similar to Dovetail Mate / Cozio's Mate.
